presets.label: Studio Classic
presets.style_prompt: Executive studio portrait, neutral gradient background, soft-box lighting, clean business attire, balanced head-and-shoulders composition.

presets.label: Tech Founder
presets.style_prompt: Modern professional portrait, bright workspace bokeh, natural indoor light, smart-casual wardrobe, approachable confident mood.

presets.label: Elite Leadership
presets.style_prompt: High-end executive portrait, tailored dark suit, subtle architectural office depth, directional but controlled lighting, authoritative and composed mood.

presets.label: Creative Studio
presets.style_prompt: Creative professional portrait with minimalist studio or gallery background, artistic but clean lighting, confident and thoughtful tone.

presets.label: Medical Professional
presets.style_prompt: Professional medical portrait with clean clinical environment, calm expression, trustworthy and warm demeanor, balanced neutral lighting.

presets.label: Academic Scholar
presets.style_prompt: Distinguished academic portrait with refined attire, study or library context, warm and intelligent presence, natural facial detail.

presets.label: Modern Resume
presets.style_prompt: Clean resume portrait, minimal background, neutral color palette, natural expression, high-fidelity skin micro-texture.

presets.label: Premium Resume
presets.style_prompt: Premium business resume portrait with polished attire, soft studio lighting, neutral gradient background, clear professional confidence.

presets.label: Creative Resume
presets.style_prompt: Creative-industry resume portrait with clean architectural context, modern styling, approachable but distinctive professional energy.

presets.label: ID Standard
presets.style_prompt: Government-style ID portrait with neutral expression, plain background, centered framing, even illumination.

presets.label: Schengen Style ID
presets.style_prompt: Neutral Schengen-style ID portrait with plain light background, centered face, controlled exposure, and clear biometric readability.

presets.label: Premium Blue ID
presets.style_prompt: Professional ID-style portrait with restrained textured blue backdrop, clean attire, balanced portrait lighting, and natural identity detail.

presets.label: Outdoor Natural
presets.style_prompt: Natural outdoor professional portrait with soft daylight, subtle background blur, realistic skin detail, and relaxed confidence.

presets.label: Casual Cafe
presets.style_prompt: Casual professional portrait in bright modern cafe setting with soft natural light and approachable social profile tone.
